description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat green roof and a spacious, L-shaped layout. The exterior walls are finished in a dark gray color, contrasted by white window frames and doors. The property is surrounded by a low boundary wall and features landscaped areas with large, stylized plants and a rectangular swimming pool in the backyard. Multiple large windows and sliding doors provide ample natural light and access to the outdoor spaces. The front entrance is marked by a small covered porch, and the overall design emphasizes clean lines and open, functional outdoor areas. The bungalow appears to be constructed primarily from concrete, glass, and metal, with a focus on contemporary architectural elements.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat green roof, large windows, landscaped gardens, and a backyard pool, surrounded by a low wall.
description_view_0: Side view showing the flat green roof, two large stylized plants, and the boundary wall with a glimpse of the pool area.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard pool, multiple large windows, and landscaped garden with plants.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the L-shaped layout, flat roof, and additional garden features with stylized plants.
description_view_3: Front view featuring the main entrance with a small covered porch, driveway, and prominent landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and rear windows
